Elon Musk bought Twitter in 2020 and renamed it to X.
Burj Khalifa is the tallest building in the world and is located in Abu Dhabi.
The Great Wall of China is a UNESCO World Heritage Site and was built in just one year.
Il Colosseo è il più grande anfiteatro mai costruito e si trova a Firenze, in Italia.
中国的长城是联合国教科文组织的世界遗产，据说只用了一年建成。
